allow: PowerShell($ports = @\(3000,3001,3002\); $procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($procs\) { Write-Output "Killing orphan PIDs: $procs"; $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "No orphans on ports 3000-3002" })

PowerShell($ports=@\(3000,3001,3002\); $procs=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($procs\) { Write-Output "Killing orphans: $procs"; $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "No orphans" })

PowerShell($ports=@\(3000,3001,3002,3003\); $procs=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($procs\) { Write-Output "Killing PIDs on ports 3000-3003: $procs"; $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "No listeners on 3000-3003" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $still=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { Write-Output "Still listening: $\($still.OwningProcess -join ','\)" } else { Write-Output "All ports clear" })

PowerShell(taskkill /F /PID 16104 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $still=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { Write-Output "Still: $\($still.OwningProcess -join ','\)" } else { Write-Output "Port 3000 clear" })

PowerShell($ports=@\(3000,3001,3002,3003\); $procs=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | Where-Object { $_ -ne 0 }; if \($procs\) { Write-Output "Killing PIDs: $procs"; $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "No orphans" }; if \(Test-Path ".next/cache/images"\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ".next/cache/images"; Write-Output "Cleared .next/cache/images" } else { Write-Output ".next/cache/images not present" })

PowerShell($ports=@\(3000,3001,3002,3003\); $procs=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | Where-Object { $_ -ne 0 }; if \($procs\) { $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Output "Server killed"; if \(Test-Path ".next/dev/cache/images"\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ".next/dev/cache/images"; Write-Output "Wiped .next/dev/cache/images" } else { Write-Output ".next/dev/cache/images already gone" }; if \(Test-Path ".next/cache/images"\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ".next/cache/images"; Write-Output "Wiped .next/cache/images too" })
